name: project_overview
content: Bean & Brew is a Go web application for a coffee shop. Architecture: Clean Architecture with 4 layers (entity→repository→usecase→handler). Tech stack: Go 1.25, chi router, SQLite (in-memory for tests), html/template. Test naming convention: TestLevel_Entity_Method (e.g. TestUnitProductValidate, TestIntegrationProductCRUD, TestAPIOrderFlow). All tests use fresh in-memory SQLite databases via setupTestDB(t) or setupTestServer(t) helpers — no shared state between tests. Table-driven tests with t.Run() used extensively for parametric coverage.

name: entity_product
content: Product entity: struct with fields ID(int64), CategoryID(int64), Name(string), Description(string), Price(float64), ImageURL(string), InStock(bool), CreatedAt(time.Time), UpdatedAt(time.Time). Methods: Validate() checks Name!="" → ErrEmptyName, Price>=0 → ErrNegativePrice, CategoryID>0 → ErrInvalidCategory (in this priority order). ApplyDiscount(percent float64) returns discounted price; returns original if percent<0 or >100. Tests: TestUnitProductValidate (14 subtests: valid, empty_name, negative_price, zero_price_valid, zero_category, negative_category, very_small_negative_price, large_price, unicode_name, spaces_only, emoji_name, very_long_name, negative_category_large, all_fields_valid_with_description). TestUnitProductApplyDiscount (12 subtests: 0/1/10/33.33/50/99/100 percent, negative returns original, over 100 returns original, tiny 0.01, exactly -0.01, exactly 100.01). TestUnitProductApplyDiscountZeroPrice — 50% of 0 = 0. TestUnitProductApplyDiscountLargePrice — 25% of 1M = 750000. TestUnitProductValidatePriorityOrder — empty name checked before negative price. TestUnitProductValidateNameBeforeCategory — empty name before zero category. TestUnitProductValidatePriceBeforeCategory — negative price before zero category.

name: entity_product_extended
content: Extended product entity tests: TestUnitProductApplyDiscountVariousPrices (15 subtests: 25% discount applied to prices 0, 1, 10, 50, 99.99, 100, 350, 500, 999, 1000, 5000, 10000, 99999, 0.01, 0.50 — verifies multiplied by 0.75). TestUnitProductApplyDiscountBoundaryPercents (10 subtests: boundary values -100, -0.01, 0, 0.01, 49.99, 50, 50.01, 99.99, 100, 100.01 — verifies correct handling of negative/over-100 returning original). TestUnitProductValidateFieldCombinations (12 subtests: all valid combos like empty+positive+valid, empty+zero+valid, name+negative+valid, etc. — exhaustive matrix of valid/invalid field combinations). TestUnitProductApplyDiscountConsistency — applying 50% twice should not mutate the product. TestUnitProductApplyDiscountVerySmallPrice — 10% of 0.001 = 0.0009. TestUnitProductValidateDescriptionOptional — empty description is valid. TestUnitProductValidateImageURLOptional — empty image URL is valid. TestUnitProductValidateInStockDefault — InStock=false is valid.

name: entity_order
content: Order entity: struct with ID(int64), CustomerID(string), Status(OrderStatus), Items([]OrderItem), Total(float64), CreatedAt/UpdatedAt(time.Time). OrderStatus constants: new, processing, completed, cancelled. OrderItem: ID, OrderID, ProductID(int64), Quantity(int), Price(float64). Methods: Validate() checks CustomerID!="" → ErrEmptyCustomerID, len(Items)>0 → ErrEmptyOrder, each item: Quantity>0 → ErrInvalidQuantity, ProductID>0 → ErrInvalidProduct. CalculateTotal() sums item.Price*item.Quantity, sets o.Total. CanCancel() returns true for new/processing. CanComplete() returns true only for processing. Tests: TestUnitOrderValidate (13 subtests: valid, empty_customer, empty_items, zero_quantity, negative_quantity, invalid_product, negative_product, nil_items, multiple_valid, second_item_invalid_quantity, second_item_invalid_product, large_quantity, unicode_customer). TestUnitOrderCalculateTotal, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalEmpty, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalSingleItem, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalLargeOrder, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalFloatPrecision, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalSetsField. TestUnitOrderCanCancel/CanComplete — 4 statuses each. TestUnitOrderCanCancelUnknownStatus/CanCompleteUnknownStatus. TestUnitOrderValidatePriorityCustomerFirst.

name: entity_order_extended
content: Extended order entity tests: TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalVariousItemCounts (10 subtests: 1 to 10 items with incrementing prices and quantities — verifies correct sum calculation). TestUnitOrderValidateMultipleInvalidItems (8 subtests: various combinations of invalid items in multi-item orders — zero qty in second item, negative product in third item, all invalid, mix valid/invalid). TestUnitOrderStatusTransitionMatrix (16 subtests: complete 4×4 matrix testing CanCancel and CanComplete for all status combinations new/processing/completed/cancelled — verifies full state machine correctness). TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalNilItems — nil items slice results in 0 total. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalMixedPrices — items with prices 0.01, 999999.99, 350 with varying quantities. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalOverwritesPrevious — calling CalculateTotal twice with different items overwrites. TestUnitOrderValidateItemsValidationOrder — first invalid item determines the error. TestUnitOrderValidateSingleItemAllFields — validates all fields of a single valid item.

name: entity_news_category
content: NewsItem entity: ID, Title, Content, Author, PublishedAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt. Validate() checks Title!="" → ErrEmptyName, Content!="" → ErrEmptyContent. Summary(maxRunes int) truncates using []rune for UTF-8 correctness; if maxRunes<=3, no ellipsis. Tests: TestUnitNewsItemValidate (10 subtests). TestUnitNewsItemSummary (6 subtests). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryEmptyContent, SummaryOneChar, SummaryMaxRunesZero/One/Two, SummaryUnicode. Category entity: ID, Name, Slug, Description, SortOrder, CreatedAt. Validate() checks Name!="" → ErrEmptyName, Slug!="" → ErrEmptySlug. Tests: TestUnitCategoryValidate (11 subtests).

name: entity_news_extended
content: Extended news entity tests: TestUnitNewsItemSummaryVariousLengths (15 subtests: Summary() called with maxRunes from 1 to 200 on long Russian text — verifies truncation at correct rune boundaries with '...' suffix). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryMultibyteEdgeCases (8 subtests: CJK characters '日本語テスト', emoji '😀🎉🍕🎸', Arabic 'مرحبا بالعالم', Thai 'สวัสดีครับ', mixed scripts — verifies correct rune-based truncation across all Unicode blocks). TestUnitNewsItemValidateFieldCombinations (9 subtests: all valid/invalid combinations of title and content fields). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryExactBoundary — content exactly at maxRunes boundary returns without ellipsis. TestUnitNewsItemSummaryNegativeMaxRunes — verifies panic on negative input. TestUnitNewsItemValidateContentPriorityOrder — title validated before content. TestUnitCategoryValidateExtended (15 subtests: expanded validation cases including unicode, hyphens, dots, numbers, long names, CJK slugs). TestUnitCategoryValidateNameBeforeSlug — validates name before slug. TestUnitCategoryValidateAllFieldsPopulated — all fields set is valid.

name: repository_product
content: ProductRepository interface: Create, GetByID, List(categoryID, offset, limit), Update, Delete, Search(query, limit), Count(categoryID). SQLite implementation in sqlite/product.go. Integration tests: TestIntegrationProductCRUD — full cycle. TestIntegrationProductList — 5 products, pagination. TestIntegrationProductSearch — Cyrillic text search. TestIntegrationProductCount — count by category. TestIntegrationProductDeleteNotFound, GetByIDNotFound, UpdateNotFound — ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationProductSearchNoResults, SearchEmptyDB. TestIntegrationProductListWithOffset — 10 products, multi-page verification. TestIntegrationProductListByNonExistentCategory. TestIntegrationProductSearchLimit. TestIntegrationProductUpdateFields. TestIntegrationProductCountAfterDelete.

name: repository_product_extended
content: Extended product repository tests: TestIntegrationProductTimestamps — verifies CreatedAt/UpdatedAt auto-set on create. TestIntegrationProductListEmptyDB — List returns empty slice. TestIntegrationProductSearchByDescription — search matches description text, not just name. TestIntegrationProductMultipleCategories — 3 categories with 3/2/4 products, verify counts per category (List + Count). TestIntegrationProductPaginationBoundary (5 subtests: offset=0/limit=3, offset=3/limit=3, offset=9/limit=3, offset=10/limit=3, offset=0/limit=100 — boundary pagination for 10 items). TestIntegrationProductSearchSpecialChars — search with %, _, ' characters doesn't break SQL. TestIntegrationProductBulkCreate — create 20 products, verify count=20. TestIntegrationProductSearchEmptyQuery — empty search returns empty. TestIntegrationProductCountEmptyDB — count=0 on fresh DB. TestIntegrationProductCountByMultipleCategories (3 subtests: count for each of 3 categories).

name: repository_category
content: CategoryRepository interface: Create, GetByID, GetBySlug, List, Update, Delete. SQLite implementation in sqlite/category.go. List returns ordered by sort_order, name. Integration tests: TestIntegrationCategoryCRUD, GetBySlug, GetBySlugNotFound, GetByIDNotFound, List (sort order), ListEmpty, UpdateNotFound, DeleteNotFound, CreateMultiple (10 cats), UpdateSortOrder.

name: repository_category_extended
content: Extended category repository tests: TestIntegrationCategorySlugUpdate — update slug then verify old slug returns 404. TestIntegrationCategorySortOrderVerification — 5 categories with sort_order 3/1/5/2/4, List returns sorted by sort_order. TestIntegrationCategoryUpdateDescription — update description field verified. TestIntegrationCategoryTimestamps — CreatedAt auto-set. TestIntegrationCategoryUpdateMultipleFields — update name+slug+description+sort_order simultaneously. TestIntegrationCategoryListAfterDelete — create 3, delete 1, list returns 2. TestIntegrationCategoryGetAfterDelete — deleted category returns ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationCategoryCreateManyAndCount — create 15 categories, list returns 15.

name: repository_news
content: NewsRepository interface: Create, GetByID, List(offset, limit), Update, Delete, Count. SQLite implementation. Create auto-sets PublishedAt to now if zero, auto-sets CreatedAt/UpdatedAt. List ordered by published_at DESC. Integration tests: TestIntegrationNewsCRUD, GetByIDNotFound, ListPagination (20 items), ListEmpty, Count (7 items), UpdateNotFound, DeleteNotFound, CreateWithPublishedAt, CreateAutoPublishedAt, ListOrderByPublishedDesc, CountAfterDelete.

name: repository_news_extended
content: Extended news repository tests: TestIntegrationNewsUpdateAllFields — update title+content+author verified via GetByID. TestIntegrationNewsListLargePagination — 50 items, page(0,10)=10, page(40,10)=10, page(45,10)=5. TestIntegrationNewsTimestamps — CreatedAt/UpdatedAt auto-set on create. TestIntegrationNewsListOffsetBeyondEnd — offset past total returns empty. TestIntegrationNewsCreateDeleteCount — create→count=1→delete→count=0. TestIntegrationNewsListEmptyDB — empty list on fresh DB. TestIntegrationNewsVerifyFields — all fields round-trip correctly. TestIntegrationNewsUpdateOnlyTitle — partial update preserves other fields. TestIntegrationNewsDeleteAndRecount — create 5, delete 2, count=3. TestIntegrationNewsOrderConsistency — DESC order by published_at verified across pages.

name: repository_order
content: OrderRepository interface: Create, GetByID, ListByCustomer(customerID, offset, limit), UpdateStatus, GetItems. SQLite implementation creates order + order_items in transaction. GetByID also loads items. Integration tests: TestIntegrationOrderCRUD, StatusTransitions (new→processing→completed), ListByCustomer (3 alice + 1 bob), GetNotFound.

name: repository_order_extended
content: Extended order repository tests: TestIntegrationOrderCreateMultipleItems — 3 items created, GetItems returns 3. TestIntegrationOrderGetItemsSeparately — GetItems(orderID) returns correct items with prices. TestIntegrationOrderListByCustomerPagination — 8 orders, page(0,3)=3, page(3,3)=3, page(6,3)=2. TestIntegrationOrderListByCustomerEmpty — empty customer returns 0. TestIntegrationOrderListByCustomerNonExistent — unknown customer returns 0. TestIntegrationOrderUpdateStatusNotFound — returns error for non-existent ID. TestIntegrationOrderUpdateStatusAllTransitions (3 subtests: new→processing, processing→completed, new→cancelled). TestIntegrationOrderCreateSetsTimestamps — CreatedAt/UpdatedAt auto-set. TestIntegrationOrderMultipleCustomers — alice(3)+bob(2)+charlie(1), verify per-customer counts. TestIntegrationOrderGetByIDReturnsItems — items loaded with GetByID. TestIntegrationOrderLargeOrder — 20 items in single order. TestIntegrationOrderCreateAndGetTotal — total preserved through create→get cycle.

name: usecase_product
content: ProductUseCase: wraps ProductRepository + CategoryRepository. Create validates product then checks category exists. List applies pagination defaults (page=1, pageSize=20). Update validates first. Delete delegates to repo. Search defaults limit to 20. Tests: TestUnitProductUCCreateValidatesCategory, CreateValidatesProduct, CreateValidatesNegativePrice, ListPagination (25 items), ListDefaultPageSize, GetByID, GetByIDNotFound, Update, UpdateValidation, Delete, Search, SearchDefaultLimit, ListByCategory.

name: usecase_product_extended
content: Extended product usecase tests: TestUnitProductUCCreateWithAllFields — product with description+image_url+in_stock, verify all fields preserved. TestUnitProductUCUpdateNonExistent — update product 999 returns error. TestUnitProductUCDeleteNonExistent — delete product 999 returns error. TestUnitProductUCSearchEmpty — empty query returns empty. TestUnitProductUCSearchUnicode — search Cyrillic text 'Латте'. TestUnitProductUCListPaginationEdgeCases (8 subtests: page 0 defaults, pageSize 0 defaults, page past end, various page/size combos with 25 items). TestUnitProductUCListEmptyDB — empty list on fresh DB. TestUnitProductUCCreateDuplicateName — duplicate name allowed (returns 201). TestUnitProductUCSearchNoResults — search 'Несуществующий'. TestUnitProductUCCreateAndRetrieve — full round-trip verification.

name: usecase_order
content: OrderUseCase: wraps OrderRepository + ProductRepository. Create: validates order, looks up product prices, sets item.Price from product, calls CalculateTotal(), sets status=new. Process: checks status=new → ErrInvalidStatus. Cancel: checks CanCancel(). Complete: checks CanComplete() (only processing). ListByCustomer: defaults page=1, pageSize=20. Tests: TestUnitOrderUCCreateSetsPrice (350*3=1050), CreateMultipleItems, CreateInvalidProduct, CreateEmptyCustomer, CreateEmptyItems, GetByID, GetByIDNotFound, ListByCustomer, ListByCustomerPagination, CancelFlow, CancelProcessing, CancelCompleted, CompleteRequiresProcessing, ProcessRequiresNew, FullLifecycle, CancelNotFound/ProcessNotFound/CompleteNotFound.

name: usecase_order_extended
content: Extended order usecase tests: TestUnitOrderUCCreateMultipleItemsSameProduct — same product with qty 2+3, total=350*5=1750. TestUnitOrderUCCreateVerifiesEachProduct — one valid + one non-existent product returns error. TestUnitOrderUCListByCustomerEmpty — unknown customer returns 0. TestUnitOrderUCStatusTransitionMatrix (12 subtests: 3 actions × 4 states — cancel/process/complete from new/processing/completed/cancelled). TestUnitOrderUCCreateSetsStatusNew — verify initial status. TestUnitOrderUCCreateCalculatesCorrectTotal — 2 products: Латте(350)*2 + Раф(400)*3 = 1900. TestUnitOrderUCCreateSetsItemPricesFromProduct — item.Price set from product.Price. TestUnitOrderUCGetByIDWithItems — 2 items returned with GetByID. TestUnitOrderUCListByCustomerPaginationEdgeCases (4 subtests: page1/2/3 of 8 items + past end). TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycleCancel — new→process→cancel lifecycle.

name: usecase_news_category
content: NewsUseCase: wraps NewsRepository. Create validates. List defaults page=1, pageSize=10. Update validates. Delete delegates. CategoryUseCase: wraps CategoryRepository. Create/Update validate. GetBySlug/List/Delete delegate. Tests: TestUnitNewsUCCreate, CreateValidationEmptyTitle/EmptyContent, GetByID/GetByIDNotFound, Update, UpdateValidation, Delete, Pagination, PaginationDefaults, CategoryUCCreate, CreateValidationEmptyName/EmptySlug, GetByID/GetBySlug/GetBySlugNotFound, List, Update, UpdateValidation, Delete.

name: usecase_news_extended
content: Extended news usecase tests: TestUnitNewsUCCreateValidatesTitle/Content — ErrEmptyName/ErrEmptyContent. TestUnitNewsUCUpdateValidatesTitle/Content — on existing item. TestUnitNewsUCUpdateNonExistent — error for ID 999. TestUnitNewsUCDeleteNonExistent — error for ID 999. TestUnitNewsUCGetByIDNonExistent — ErrNotFound. TestUnitNewsUCListEmpty — 0 items, total=0. content: Product API tests (16 original + 12 extended = 28 tests): Original: TestAPIProductCRUD, ValidationError, GetByID, NotFound, Update, UpdateValidationError, Delete, DeleteNotFound, Search, SearchEmpty, SearchNoResults, ListPagination, ListByCategory, InvalidJSON, InvalidID, SearchWithLimit. TestAPICategoryUpdateInvalidID/DeleteInvalidID/GetInvalidID — /categories/abc = 400. TestAPICategoryUpdateValidation (3 subtests: empty name, empty slug, valid). Extended: TestAPINewsCreateValidationCases (12 subtests: empty title/content, both empty, missing fields, valid minimal, with author, unicode, long title, emoji, long content, special chars). TestAPINewsUpdateInvalidID/DeleteInvalidID/GetInvalidID — /news/abc = 400. TestAPINewsUpdateNotFound — /news/99999 = 404. TestAPINewsUpdateValidationCases (3 subtests: empty title, empty content, valid). TestAPINewsListEmpty — 200 on empty. name: api_order_tests
content: Order API tests (19 original + 17 extended = 36 tests): Original: TestAPIOrderFlow, EmptyItems, GetByID, GetByIDNotFound, Process, Complete, Cancel, CancelAlreadyCancelled, CompleteWithoutProcess, ListByCustomer, EmptyCustomerID, InvalidJSON, MultipleItems, ProcessNotFound/CancelNotFound/CompleteNotFound, FullLifecycleViaAPI, InvalidProduct. Extended: TestAPIOrderCreateValidationCases (10 subtests: empty customer, no items, zero/negative quantity, invalid/non-existent productID, valid order, multiple items, unicode customer, missing customer). TestAPIOrderProcessInvalidID/CancelInvalidID/CompleteInvalidID/GetInvalidID — /orders/abc = 400. TestAPIOrderStatusAfterProcess/Complete/Cancel — verify status via GET after action. TestAPIOrderDoubleProcess — process twice = 400. TestAPIOrderProcessCompleted — process after complete = 400. TestAPIOrderCancelCompleted — cancel after complete = 400. TestAPIOrderCreateVerifiesTotal (4 subtests: qty 1/3/5/10 × price 350). TestAPIOrderCRUDFullCycle — create→GET→process→complete→verify status=completed.

name: api_helpers_and_infrastructure
content: TestAPIResponseContentType — verifies Content-Type: application/json on list endpoints. TestAPIErrorResponseFormat — verifies error responses have {'error': '...'} structure. Helper functions: setupTestServer(t) creates httptest.Server with full handler stack (all 4 handlers + chi router), postJSON(url, body) marshals and posts, putJSON for PUT, doDelete for DELETE, decodeBody reads response JSON, createCategory/createProduct/createNewsItem/createTestOrderAPI convenience helpers. All tests isolated via fresh in-memory SQLite. writeError() maps entity errors to HTTP status codes: ErrNotFound→404, validation errors→400, ErrAlreadyExists→409.

name: test_infrastructure
content: Test infrastructure pattern: setupTestDB(t) in testhelper_test.go opens :memory: SQLite, runs RunMigrations, registers db.Close() as t.Cleanup. seedCategory(t, repo) creates default 'Тестовая/test-cat' category. setupTestServer(t) creates full server stack: 4 repos + 4 usecases + 4 handlers + chi router → httptest.NewServer. setupUC(t) returns all 4 use cases with shared in-memory DB. seedCatAndProduct(t, productUC, categoryUC) creates default 'Кофе/coffee' category and 'Латте' product (price=350). setupOrderTestData(t, db) creates category+product and returns IDs for order tests. createTestOrder(t, repo, catID, prodID, customerID) convenience for order repo tests. All test functions start with fresh database — no test pollution.

name: coverage_entity_layer
content: Entity layer test coverage: 237 test runs total. Breakdown: Product validation 14+15+12+5 subtests, Product discount calculations 12+15+10+3, Order validation 13+8 subtests, Order total calculations 10+5, Order status transitions 16 (full 4×4 state machine matrix), News validation 10+9, News summary 15+8+6, Category validation 11+15+3. All entity tests are pure unit tests — they exercise struct methods (Validate, ApplyDiscount, CalculateTotal, CanCancel, CanComplete) without any database or HTTP layer. No setup helpers needed.

name: coverage_repository_layer
content: Repository layer test coverage: 94 test runs total. Breakdown: Product 14 original + 12 extended, Category 10+8, News 11+10, Order 4+13. All repository tests are integration tests — they require a live SQLite database and call setupTestDB(t) to obtain an in-memory database with migrations applied.

name: coverage_usecase_layer
content: Usecase layer test coverage: 127 test runs total. Breakdown: Product 13+12, Order 19+14, News 10+14, Category 9+13. Usecase tests use setupUC(t) helper which creates all 4 use cases sharing one in-memory database with migrations applied — meaning they depend on the migration schema.

name: coverage_api_layer
content: API handler layer test coverage: 179 test runs total. Breakdown: Product 16+12 extended (with 12+6+5 subtests), Category 10+14 extended (with 12+3 subtests), News 12+15 extended (with 12+6+3 subtests), Order 19+17 extended (with 10+4 subtests). API tests use setupTestServer(t) helper which spins up the full chi router + 4 handlers + 4 usecases + 4 repositories on a single in-memory SQLite with migrations applied.

name: known_issues_and_flaky_analysis
content: TestIntegrationProductSearch is potentially flaky: uses LIKE queries with Cyrillic text, behavior may vary across SQLite versions; depends on insert order. TestUnitNewsItemSummary was previously buggy — used len() instead of []rune for UTF-8 string truncation, now fixed. TestAPIProductSearchNoResults required nil-safe type assertion — products key can be null JSON array when Search returns nil slice, fixed with comma-ok assertion. The Go/SQLite search uses case-insensitive LIKE which works for ASCII but may not work correctly for all Unicode characters. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalFloatPrecision uses tolerance check (±0.1) because IEEE 754 float arithmetic for 0.1*10+0.2*5 is not exactly 2.0. TestUnitProductApplyDiscount for 33.33% uses tolerance (±0.1). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryNegativeMaxRunes panics on negative input (slice bounds out of range) — expected behavior, test verifies panic with recover(). TestAPICategoryCreateDuplicateSlug returns 500 (SQLite UNIQUE constraint error) — not mapped to a specific HTTP error code.

name: error_handling_map
content: Error to HTTP status mapping in handler/helpers.go writeError(): ErrNotFound→404, ErrEmptyName→400, ErrEmptySlug→400, ErrEmptyContent→400, ErrNegativePrice→400, ErrInvalidCategory→400, ErrInvalidProduct→400, ErrInvalidQuantity→400, ErrEmptyCustomerID→400, ErrEmptyOrder→400, ErrInvalidStatus→400, ErrAlreadyExists→409, all other errors→500. This is tested indirectly through API tests that verify correct status codes for each error type. The entity/errors.go defines all 12 sentinel errors. Tests verify validation order: Validate() checks are sequential — first failing check determines the returned error.

name: order_state_machine
content: Order status transitions: new→processing (Process), processing→completed (Complete), new→cancelled (Cancel), processing→cancelled (Cancel). Invalid transitions return ErrInvalidStatus: completed→cancelled, cancelled→anything, new→completed (must process first), processing→processing (already processing). Tested at 3 layers: entity (CanCancel/CanComplete methods + full 4×4 status transition matrix), usecase (Process/Cancel/Complete with GetByID→check→UpdateStatus + 12-subtest action×state matrix), API (POST /orders/{id}/process|complete|cancel returning 200 or 400 + status verification via GET). TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycle, TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycleCancel, and TestAPIOrderCRUDFullCycle test complete happy paths with status verification at each step.
